privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task involving applying brand styling to a customer onboarding flowchart diagram in draw.io 26.0.9. The diagram contains 14 process steps, 4 decision points, and 2 terminators. The brand style guide specifies exact hex color codes for each shape type: process steps use ACME Navy (#1B365D), decision diamonds use ACME Orange (#E87722), terminators use ACME Sky Blue (#00A3E0), and connectors use Dark Gray (#4A4A4A) at 2pt width. All shapes require shadows enabled, and process steps additionally require rounded corners. The expected output is a restyled drawio file with PNG and PDF exports to ~/Diagrams/exports/.
